## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm test` / `pnpm schema:validate` pass
- [ ] `pnpm format` applied
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, recordings, or personal paths committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/protocol changed
